sensitivity: 95.1% (WLI mode), 95.5% (LCI mode) at lesion level; 71.9% (WLI mode), 81.7% (LCI mode) at frame level
intended_use: This software is a computer-assisted reading tool designed to aid endoscopists in detecting colonic mucosal lesions (such as polyps and adenomas) in real time during standard endoscopy examinations of
intended_use_full: This software is a computer-assisted reading tool designed to aid endoscopists in detecting colonic mucosal lesions (such as polyps and adenomas) in real time during standard endoscopy examinations of patients undergoing screening and surveillance endoscopic mucosal evaluations. This software is used with standard White Light Imaging (WLI) and Linked Color Imaging (LCI) endoscopy imaging. This software is not intended to replace clinical decision making.
target_condition: Colonic mucosal lesions including polyps and adenomas
ground_truth: Histopathological examination of resected or biopsied specimens
other_metrics: False Positive Objects/Patient: 1.42 (WLI, 95% CI 1.09-1.81), 0.76 (LCI, 95% CI 0.42-1.21); Adenoma Per Colonoscopy (APC) superiority: IRR 1.17 (95% CI 1.01-1.36), p=0.018; Positive Percent Agreement (PPA): 63.1% (CAC), 60.7% (CC), 95% CI -10.50% to -2.30%; Polyp Per Colonoscopy (PPC): IRR 1.27 (95% CI 1.14-1.40), p<0.001; Serrated Lesions Per Colonoscopy (SLPC): IRR 1.45 (95% CI 1.23-1.71), p<0.001; Serrated Lesions Detection Rate (SLDR): 35.6% (CAC) vs 29.1% (CC), p=0.027
